area: Git-head evidence hygiene on failed commits
finding: A failed governed commit attempt leaves its prepared commit record appended to `.atm/history/evidence/git-head.jsonl`; the orphan line (tree never committed) later blocks `taskflow close` as governance-tracked dirty state.
expectedBehavior: Commit-prep evidence should be finalized only when the commit lands, or failed-attempt records should be auto-reconciled/annotated so close preflight does not require manual `git restore` of the evidence log.
evidenceOrRepro: TASK-TEAM-0081 delivery `573ac3cf` added failed commit evidence reconciliation and close-preflight coverage; close packet `.atm/history/evidence/TASK-TEAM-0081.closure-packet.json` marks the task done.
